title: WebP to PNG: How I Saved Our Email Campaign in 10 Minutes
title_hi: WebP to PNG: How I Saved Our Email Campaign in 10 Minutes
summary:

content:
I spent weeks optimizing our landing page images as WebP. Page load dropped 40%. Lighthouse score hit 95.

Then marketing sent the weekly newsletter. Every product image was broken.


  
  
  The Problem Nobody Talks About


Email clients do not render WebP. Gmail, Outlook, Mailchimp — none of them support it. All that optimization meant nothing when our customers saw broken image placeholders.


  
  
  The Emergency Fix


I batch-converted 200 product photos back to PNG in one go. The tool preserved alpha channels on transparent product shots, which was critical — our previous converter flattened them to white backgrounds.


  
  
  What I Use Now


webp2png.io handles batch WebP-to-PNG conversion including transparency. No upload, runs in the browser.

My rule: WebP for the web, PNG for everything else.

What format headaches have you dealt with?

title: SVG to PNG: The DPI Setting That Kept Getting My Work Rejected
title_hi: SVG to PNG: The DPI Setting That Kept Getting My Work Rejected
summary:
A print shop rejected my client banner artwork three times. The reason? "72 DPI — unacceptable for print."

The source f
content:
A print shop rejected my client banner artwork three times. The reason? "72 DPI — unacceptable for print."

The source file was a perfectly crisp vector SVG. Every export came out at web resolution because I never checked the DPI setting.


  
  
  The Fix That Changed Everything


Most SVG-to-PNG converters default to 72 DPI because they target screen display. If you are exporting for print, you need 300 DPI minimum.

I switched to specifying 300 DPI on every export. The same banner was accepted on the first re-submission.


  
  
  How I Do It Now


svg2png.org lets you specify export resolution. One SVG source, any DPI output — 1x for web, 3x for retina, 300 DPI for print.

Checklist before exporting SVG to PNG:


Who is the audience? Screen or print?
What DPI does the destination require?
Does the converter preserve transparency?


This one setting has saved me hours of rework. Anyone else had print shops reject web-resolution files?

title: The Missing 180px Icon That Cost a Brand 6 Months of iPhone Impressions

content:
I audited a client site that had been live for six months. On a hunch, I added their site to my iPhone home screen.

A gray letter placeholder. Six months of visitors bookmarking the site and seeing a generic icon.


  
  
  The Three Files Every Site Needs


Most developers stop at favicon.ico. That covers browser tabs. But it does nothing for:


iPhone/iPad home screen bookmarks
Android home screen shortcuts
PWA install prompts


The minimum set is three files:



<link rel="icon" sizes="32x32" href="/favicon-32x32.png">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/apple-touch-icon.png">
<link rel="manifest" href="/site.webmanifest">







  
  
  One-Click Generation


I use genfavicon.org to generate the complete package. It outputs all sizes plus the manifest in one download.

Quick audit: Add your site to your iPhone home screen right now. If it is a gray letter, you are missing the apple-touch-icon.

How long has your site been showing a placeholder?

title: Trailing Comma Took Down Production at 11 PM — A JSON Debugging Story
title_hi: 11 बजे उत्पादन बंद हो गया — एक जेसन डीबगिंग कहानी
summary: JSON debugging story: how a trailing comma caused production failure
content: A recent deploy failure at 11 PM due to a cryptic error in a JSON file led to a 10-minute debugging session. The issue was a trailing comma in a 200KB JSON object. This experience highlights the importance of beautifying and validating JSON before deployment. Minified JSON may save bandwidth but costs debugging time. To avoid such issues, I now beautify JSON before code review, validate syntax before deployment, and use tools like formlyapp.org to format, validate, and highlight errors.
content_hi: हाल ही में 11 बजे एक जेसन फ़ाइल में एक रहस्यमय त्रुटि के कारण तैनाती विफल हो गई, जिसके लिए 10 मिनट का डीबगिंग सत्र चला। समस्या 200KB जेसन ऑब्जेक्ट में एक ट्रेलिंग कमा थी। यह अनुभव जेसन को तैनाती से पहले सुंदर और मान्य करने के महत्व को रेखांकित करता है। सिकुड़ा हुआ जेसन बैंडविथ की बचत कर सकता है, लेकिन डीबगिंग समय की लागत आती है।

title: From 8.2s to 2.1s: How Image Compression Boosted Conversions
title_hi: 8.2 सेकंड से 2.1 सेकंड: इमेज संपीड़न ने रूपांतरण दर को कैसे बदला
summary: Image compression boosts conversion rates
content: I recently audited a Shopify store with a 22MB homepage and 4MB product images, resulting in an 8.2-second page load time and a 1.1% conversion rate. By applying lossless compression, the average file size decreased to 400KB, and the page load time improved to 2.1 seconds. This change led to an 18% increase in the conversion rate, rising to 1.3%. The Lighthouse score also improved from 35 to 92. I used compress2png.com for lossless PNG compression, which is a quick and efficient solution.
content_hi: मैंने हाल ही में एक शॉपिफाई स्टोर की समीक्षा की, जिसका होमपेज 22MB और प्रोडक्ट इमेज 4MB थी, जिससे पेज लोड समय 8.2 सेकंड और रूपांतरण दर 1.1% थी। नुकसान-रहित संपीड़न लागू करने से औसत फ़ाइल आकार 400KB हो गया और पेज लोड समय 2.1 सेकंड हो गया। इससे रूपांतरण दर में 18% की वृद्धि हुई और यह 1.3% हो गई। लाइटहाउस स्कोर भी 35 से 92 हो गया। मैंने नुकसान-रहित पीएनजी संपीड़न के लिए compress2png.com का उपयोग किया, जो एक त्वरित और कुशल समाधान है।

title: Hotel AI Concierge Software: Revolutionizing Guest Experiences
title_hi: होटल एआई कॉन्सिएर्ज सॉफ्टवेयर: अतिथि अनुभवों में क्रांति
summary: Hotel AI Concierge Software for improved guest experiences
content: The hospitality industry is evolving rapidly, with guests expecting instant responses and personalized service. Hotel AI Concierge Software is transforming guest experiences by providing 24/7 assistance across multiple channels. This intelligent digital assistant helps hotels answer guest enquiries, automate reservations, and recommend services, resulting in improved guest satisfaction and increased direct bookings.
content_hi: होटल उद्योग तेजी से बदलता जा रहा है, जहां अतिथि तुरंत प्रतिक्रिया और व्यक्तिगत सेवा की अपेक्षा करते हैं। होटल एआई कॉन्सिएर्ज सॉफ्टवेयर अतिथि अनुभवों को बदलने के लिए विभिन्न चैनलों पर 24/7 सहायता प्रदान कर रहा है। यह बुद्धिमान डिजिटल सहायक होटलों को अतिथि पूछताछ का उत्तर देने, आरक्षण स्वचालित करने और सेवाओं की सिफारिश करने में मदद करता है।

title: Simplifying AI Integration: Unified API Gateways for Kimi K3 and Beyond
title_hi: किमी के3 और आगे के लिए एकीकृत एआई एपीआई गेटवे: जटिलता को सरल बनाना
summary: Unified API gateways simplify AI integration for Kimi K3 and beyond
content: The AI landscape is rapidly evolving, with new models like Kimi K3 and DeepSeek emerging. However, this growth has led to 'API fragmentation,' causing headaches for developers. Different authentication methods, non-standard payload structures, and fragmented billing systems make it challenging to integrate these models. A unified AI API gateway can solve this problem by providing a single interface for multiple models, normalizing requests and abstracting away instability. This approach enables developers to focus on their core business logic without worrying about the complexities of individual model integrations. With the rise of powerful regional models, unified API gateways are becoming essential for building scalable and efficient AI applications.
content_hi: एआई परिदृश्य तेजी से विकसित हो रहा है, जिसमें किमी के3 और डीपसीक जैसे नए मॉडल सामने आ रहे हैं। हालांकि, इस विकास ने 'एपीआई खंडितकरण' की समस्या पैदा की है, जो डेवलपर्स के लिए चुनौतीपूर्ण है। विभिन्न प्रमाणीकरण विधियों, गैर-मानक पेलोड संरचनाओं और खंडित बिलिंग प्रणालियों के कारण मॉडल एकीकरण करना मुश्किल हो जाता है। एक एकीकृत एआई एपीआई गेटवे इस समस्या का समाधान प्रदान कर सकता है, जो एकल इंटरफ़ेस प्रदान करके अनुरोधों को सामान्य बनाता है और अस्थिरता को 추bstract करता है।

title: Revolutionizing AI Trading: Introducing Neverbell
title_hi: एनआईवेरबेल: एआई ट्रेडिंग में क्रांति
summary: AI trading revolutionized with Neverbell
content: Most AI agents can analyze markets, but few can execute trades. Neverbell bridges this gap with an open-source skill, enabling AI agents to research markets and execute trades while keeping users in control. With Neverbell, agents can research markets, review live information, and execute trades through Hyperliquid, all within user-defined limits. The skill operates within established workflows, allowing developers to inspect, improve, and customize the code to fit their systems.
content_hi: अधिकांश एआई एजेंट बाजारों का विश्लेषण कर सकते हैं, लेकिन कुछ ही व्यापार कर सकते हैं। एनआईवेरबेल इस अंतर को पाटता है एक ओपन-सोर्स कौशल के साथ, एआई एजेंटों को बाजारों का अनुसंधान करने और व्यापार करने में सक्षम बनाता है, जबकि उपयोगकर्ता नियंत्रण में रहते हैं। एनआईवेरबेल के साथ, एजेंट बाजारों का अनुसंधान कर सकते हैं, लाइव जानकारी की समीक्षा कर सकते हैं और हाइपरलिक्विड के माध्यम से व्यापार कर सकते हैं, सभी उपयोगकर्ता-परिभाषित सीमाओं के भीतर।

title: AI Overviews Revolutionize Search: Is Your Marketing Ready?
title_hi: एआई ओवरव्यू सर्च को बदल रहे हैं: क्या आपकी मार्केटिंग रणनीति तैयार है?
summary: AI Overviews change search, update your marketing strategy
content: The speed of search development is astonishing. AI Overviews provide instant answers, changing how businesses attract visitors. Traditional SEO is still crucial, but being ranked on page one is no longer enough. Content must be correct, credible, and useful to appear in AI-driven search results. Businesses should focus on developing content that addresses consumer questions, providing expertise and value beyond keyword inclusion.
content_hi: सर्च के विकास की गति वास्तव में आश्चर्यजनक है। एआई ओवरव्यू उपयोगकर्ताओं को तुरंत उत्तर प्रदान करते हैं, जिससे व्यवसायों को आगंतुकों को आकर्षित करने के तरीके बदल जाते हैं। पारंपरिक एसईओ अभी भी महत्वपूर्ण है, लेकिन पेज वन पर रैंक होना पर्याप्त नहीं है। सामग्री सही होनी चाहिए, विश्वसनीय होनी चाहिए, और उपयोगी होनी चाहिए ताकि यह एआई-संचालित खोज परिणामों में दिखाई दे।

title: Ternary Plots in 2026: A Modern Guide to Visualizing Three-Part Data Distributions
title_hi: 2026 में टर्नरी प्लॉट: तीन-भाग डेटा वितरण को दृश्य化 करने के लिए एक आधुनिक गाइड
summary: Ternary plots for data visualization
content: Businesses often deal with data distributed across multiple components. Traditional visualizations like stacked bar charts or pie charts can display proportions but become difficult to compare with many observations. Ternary plots provide a powerful alternative, representing the complete composition of three variables simultaneously. This allows for understanding relationships, similarities, and trade-offs at a glance. As organizations adopt AI-powered analytics, ternary plots have become valuable for compositional data analysis.
content_hi: व्यवसाय अक्सर एक से अधिक घटकों में वितरित डेटा के साथ काम करते हैं। पारंपरिक दृश्यीकरण जैसे स्टैक्ड बार चार्ट या पाई चार्ट आनुपातिक रूप से प्रदर्शित कर सकते हैं लेकिन कई अवलोकनों के साथ तुलना करना मुश्किल हो जाता है। टर्नरी प्लॉट एक शक्तिशाली विकल्प प्रदान करते हैं, जो तीन चरों की पूर्ण संरचना को एक ही समय में प्रस्तुत करते हैं।

title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
title_hi: ग्लो $1.2 बिलियन के मूल्यांकन पर सुरक्षा चुनौतियों का सामना करने के लिए उतरा
summary: Glow emerges at $1.2B to revolutionize AI-era endpoint security
content:
Glow is revolutionizing endpoint security with its AI-powered solution. The company has emerged from stealth mode with a whopping $1.2 billion valuation, aiming to tackle the new class of risks posed by AI agents and developer tools within enterprises. By leveraging AI and machine learning, Glow provides unparalleled visibility and protection against these emerging threats. 
   The rapid adoption of AI and developer tools has created a new wave of endpoint risks that traditional security solutions often fail to address. Glow's cutting-edge technology fills this gap, empowering organizations to stay ahead of the threats. 
   With its innovative approach, Glow is poised to challenge the status quo in endpoint security, providing a robust and adaptive defense against the evolving threat landscape.
content_hi:
ग्लो एआई-पowered सुरक्षा समाधान के साथ एंडपॉइंट सुरक्षा में क्रांति ला रहा है। कंपनी ने 1.2 अरब डॉलर के मूल्यांकन के साथ स्टील्थ मोड से बाहर निकलकर एआई एजेंट और डेवलपर टूल्स द्वारा प्रस्तुत नए खतरों का सामना करने का लक्ष्य रखा है। 
   एआई और डेवलपर टूल्स को अपनाने से जो नए खतरे उत्पन्न हुए हैं, उन्हें पारंपरिक सुरक्षा समाधान अक्सर संबोधित नहीं कर पाते हैं। ग्लो की अत्याधुनिक तकनीक इस अंतर को भरती है, संगठनों को विकसित होते खतरों से आगे रहने में सक्षम बनाती है। 
   अपने नवाचारी दृष्टिकोण के साथ, ग्लो एंडपॉइंट सुरक्षा में स्थिति को चुनौती देने के लिए तैयार है, विकसित होते खतरों के खिलाफ एक मजबूत और अनुकूल रक्षा प्रदान करता है।

title: Avengers: Doomsday Smashes Records
title_hi: अवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे ने तोड़े रिकॉर्ड
summary: Avengers: Doomsday breaks records
content: Avengers: Doomsday has taken the world by storm with its trailer launch and advance ticket sales. The highly anticipated game's first proper trailer was released yesterday, generating immense buzz among fans. Advance ticket sales have also begun, with the game already breaking records. With its massive launch, Avengers: Doomsday has secured the second-biggest trailer launch ever, behind only Spider-Man: Brand New Day. The game's success can be attributed to its engaging storyline and impressive gameplay. Fans are eagerly waiting for the game's release, and it is expected to be one of the biggest hits of the year.
content_hi: अवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे ने अपने ट्रेलर लॉन्च और एडवांस टिकट बिक्री के साथ धूम मचा दी है। इस अत्यधिक प्रत्याशित गेम का पहला प्रॉपर ट्रेलर कल जारी किया गया था, जिसने प्रशंसकों के बीच जबरदस्त उत्साह पैदा किया है। एडवांस टिकट बिक्री भी शुरू हो गई है, और गेम पहले ही रिकॉर्ड तोड़ दिए हैं। अपने विशाल लॉन्च के साथ, अवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे ने दूसरा सबसे बड़ा ट्रेलर लॉन्च हासिल किया है, जो केवल स्पाइडर-मैन: ब्रांड न्यू डे के पीछे है।

title: Pokémon Rival Palworld May Join Fortnite Instead
title_hi: पोकेमोन की जगह पालवर्ल्ड फोर्टनाइट में शामिल हो सकता है
summary: Palworld may join Fortnite
content: The possibility of Pokémon appearing in Fortnite seems to have diminished, with Palworld emerging as a potential crossover candidate. Palworld, a Steam hit, has gained popularity for its creature-collecting mechanics, drawing comparisons to the Pokémon series. This similarity could lead to an interesting collaboration between Palworld and Fortnite, bringing a new dimension to the battle royale game. With its unique creatures and engaging gameplay, Palworld could be the perfect alternative to Pokémon in Fortnite.
content_hi: पोकेमोन के फोर्टनाइट में आने की संभावना कम होती दिख रही है, और इसकी जगह पालवर्ल्ड एक संभावित क्रॉसओवर उम्मीदवार के रूप में उभरा है। पालवर्ल्ड, एक स्टीम हिट, अपनी रचनात्मक प्राणियों को इकट्ठा करने की तकनीक के लिए प्रसिद्ध है, जो पोकेमोन श्रृंखला की तुलना में आता है। यह समानता पालवर्ल्ड और फोर्टनाइट के बीच एक दिलचस्प सहयोग का कारण बन सकती है, जो बैटल रॉयल गेम में एक नई दिशा ला सकती है।

title: The $7.2 Billion Gaming Market at Risk: Sony's Disc Decision
title_hi: ७.२ अरब डॉलर का गेमिंग बाजार संकट में: सोनी का डिस्क निर्णय
summary: Sony's disc decision threatens $7.2B gaming market
content: Sony's decision to discontinue PlayStation discs for new games from 2028 has sent shockwaves through the gaming community. Analysts warn that this move could potentially destroy the second-hand video game market, valued at $7.2 billion. The pre-owned game market relies heavily on the ability to buy, sell, and trade physical copies of games. Without discs, the market's very foundation is threatened.
content_hi: सोनी द्वारा २०२८ से नए गेम्स के लिए प्लेस्टेशन डिस्क का उत्पादन बंद करने के निर्णय से गेमिंग समुदाय में हलचल मच गई है। विश्लेषकों का कहना है कि यह कदम ७.२ अरब डॉलर के प्रयुक्त वीडियो गेम बाजार को नष्ट कर सकता है। प्रयुक्त गेम बाजार शारीरिक प्रतियों को खरीदने, बेचने और व्यापार करने की क्षमता पर बहुत अधिक निर्भर करता है। डिस्क के बिना, बाजार का बहुत आधार खतरे में पड़ जाता है।

title: ZeroSpace: A Galactic Ambition Marred by Streamer Pandering
title_hi: ज़ीरोस्पेस: एक आकाशगामी महत्वाकांक्षा जो स्ट्रимер पांडering से मारी जाती है
summary: ZeroSpace review: Ambitious RTS-RPG marred by streamer focus
content: ZeroSpace is an RTS-RPG that promises a lot with its Helldivers 2-inspired Galactic War. The game's ambition is impressive, with a massive scope and intricate gameplay mechanics. However, the constant pandering to streamers and content creators is a major turn-off. The idea of helping a streamer become the Galactic Emperor is not only unappealing but also feels like a desperate attempt to garner attention. Despite its impressive features, the game's focus on streamer integration overshadows its potential, making it a less enjoyable experience for players who prefer a more traditional gaming approach.
content_hi: ज़ीरोस्पेस एक आरटीएस-आरपीजी है जो अपने हेल्डाइवर्स 2 प्रेरित गैलेक्टिक युद्ध के साथ बहुत कुछ वादा करता है। गेम की महत्वाकांक्षा प्रभावशाली है, एक विशाल दायरे और जटिल गेमप्ले तंत्र के साथ। हालांकि, स्ट्रीमर और सामग्री निर्माताओं के प्रति निरंतर पांडering एक बड़ा मोड़ है। एक स्ट्रीमर को गैलेक्टिक सम्राट बनाने में मदद करने का विचार न केवल अपील नहीं करता है, बल्कि ध्यान आकर्षित करने के लिए एक हताश प्रयास की तरह लगता है।

title: Arc Raiders' Matchmaking Just Got a Boost
title_hi: आर्क रेडर्स में मैचमेकिंग का नया संस्करण
summary: Arc Raiders updates matchmaking for better teams
content: The wait for better teammates has just gotten more promising with Arc Raiders' latest matchmaking optimization update. This new system aims to pair players with more compatible teammates, potentially leading to more enjoyable and successful gameplay experiences. However, Embark Studios warns that this might come with a trade-off: longer queue times. The reasoning is straightforward - the system is now working harder to ensure better matches, which can take a bit more time. The question remains, how long would you wait for the perfect team?
content_hi: आर्क रेडर्स के नवीनतम मैचमेकिंग अनुकूलन अपडेट के साथ बेहतर टीम की प्रतीक्षा और भी आशाजनक हो गई है। यह नया सिस्टम खिलाड़ियों को अधिक संगत टीम के साथियों के साथ जोड़ने का लक्ष्य रखता है, जिससे अधिक आनंददायक और सफल गेमप्ले अनुभव हो सकते हैं। हालांकि, एम्बार्क स्टूडियोज चेतावनी देता है कि इसके परिणामस्वरूप क्यू समय थोड़ा लंबा हो सकता है।

title: Steam Deck Sales Plummet 80% After Price Hike
title_hi: स्टीम डेक बिक्री ८०% गिरी
summary: Steam Deck sales drop 80% after price hike
content: The Steam Deck, a handheld gaming console, has seen a drastic decline in sales. Estimates suggest that sales have dropped by around 80% since the significant price increase earlier this year. This decline is a result of the massive price hikes, making the console less appealing to potential buyers. The Steam Deck was initially praised for its innovative design and capabilities, but the increased cost has deterred many gamers from purchasing it. As a result, the sales have plummeted, affecting the overall market presence of the console.
content_hi: स्टीम डेक, एक हाथ में पकड़ने वाला गेमिंग कंसोल, की बिक्री में भारी गिरावट आई है। अनुमान है कि पहले इस साल की बड़ी कीमत वृद्धि के बाद से बिक्री लगभग ८०% गिर गई है। यह गिरावट बड़ी कीमत वृद्धि का परिणाम है, जिससे कंसोल संभावित खरीदारों के लिए कम आकर्षक हो गया है।

title: Mahama Unveils Free Primary Healthcare Roadmap
title_hi: महामा की मुफ्त प्राथमिक स्वास्थ्य देखभाल योजना
summary: Mahama's Free Primary Healthcare Programme
content: President John Dramani Mahama has outlined a tiered delivery system for his Free Primary Healthcare Programme, aiming to bring medical services closer to Ghanaians. The rollout will commence in 150 districts, utilizing a phased approach that combines human resources with innovative mobile technology. The 'On Your Doorstep' programme will be revived, leveraging motorcycles, mobile clinics, and health kiosks to reach remote areas. The programme consists of three stages: primary level care at community centers, secondary level care at district hospitals with NHIS integration, and specialized care.
content_hi: राष्ट्रपति जॉन द्रमानी महामा ने अपने मुफ्त प्राथमिक स्वास्थ्य देखभाल कार्यक्रम के लिए एक स्तरित वितरण प्रणाली का अनावरण किया है, जिसका उद्देश्य घाना के लोगों के लिए चिकित्सा सेवाओं को अधिक सुलभ बनाना है। यह कार्यक्रम तीन चरणों में काम करेगा: प्राथमिक स्तर पर सामुदायिक केंद्रों पर मुफ्त देखभाल, द्वितीय स्तर पर जिला अस्पतालों में एनएचआईएस एकीकरण के साथ देखभाल, और विशेषज्ञ देखभाल।

title: 7 Tips to Choose the Right Real Estate Tokenization Development Company
title_hi: सही रियल एस्टेट टोकनीकरण विकास कंपनी चुनने के 7 सुझाव
summary: Real Estate Tokenization Development Company
content: The real estate industry is embracing digital innovation at an impressive pace, with tokenization emerging as a key advancement. By converting property ownership into blockchain-based digital tokens, businesses can unlock fractional ownership and attract a wider pool of investors. To succeed, it's crucial to select the right development partner, bringing technical expertise, business understanding, security, and long-term support.
content_hi: रियल एस्टेट उद्योग डिजिटल नवाचारों को आश्चर्यजनक गति से अपना रहा है, और टोकनीकरण इसके सबसे रोमांचक प्रगति में से एक है। ब्लॉकचेन-आधारित डिजिटल टोकन में संपत्ति स्वामित्व को परिवर्तित करके, व्यवसाय अंशधारित स्वामित्व को अनलॉक कर सकते हैं और एक व्यापक निवेशक पूल को आकर्षित कर सकते हैं।

title: Stop Relying on Third-Party Data: Build User Trust with Ethical First-Party Data
title_hi: तीसरे पक्ष के डेटा पर निर्भर न करें: नैतिक पहले पक्ष के डेटा के साथ उपयोगकर्ता विश्वास बनाएं
summary: Build user trust with ethical first-party data
content: The end of third-party data is here. Privacy regulations and rising user expectations have changed how digital products collect and use data. Users now care about how their information is gathered and handled. Ethical first-party data, collected transparently and used responsibly, supports better experiences and stronger relationships. It's information users intentionally provide through direct interactions with a product. Examples include account registrations, preference centers, and analytics events.
content_hi: तीसरे पक्ष के डेटा का अंत आ गया है। गोपनीयता नियम और बढ़ती उपयोगकर्ता अपेक्षाओं ने डिजिटल उत्पादों द्वारा डेटा संग्रह और उपयोग को बदल दिया है। उपयोगकर्ता अब अपनी जानकारी कैसे एकत्र की जाती है और इसका कैसे संभाल किया जाता है, इसके बारे में परवाह करते हैं।

title: Pinterest Masonry: CSS Columns vs JavaScript
title_hi: पिंटरेस्ट मेसन्री: सीएसएस कॉलम बनाम जावास्क्रिप्ट
summary: Pinterest masonry layout techniques
content: A Pinterest board is a wall of cards with varying heights that tile together seamlessly. I built the layout using two techniques: one-line CSS columns and shortest-column JavaScript. The CSS Grid can't achieve this due to its row-based model. Instead, I used CSS columns by setting column-count and column-gap on the container and marking each pin with break-inside: avoid. This approach requires zero JavaScript. On the other hand, the JavaScript method involves calculating the shortest column and placing the next item there. Both techniques have their trade-offs, and the choice depends on the specific use case.
content_hi: पिंटरेस्ट बोर्ड विभिन्न ऊंचाइयों के कार्ड की दीवार है जो बिना किसी अंतराल के एक साथ जुड़ते हैं। मैंने दो तकनीकों का उपयोग करके पूरे लेआउट का निर्माण किया: एक-पंक्ति सीएसएस कॉलम और सबसे छोटी कॉलम जावास्क्रिप्ट। सीएसएस ग्रिड इसे अपने पंक्ति-आधारित मॉडल के कारण प्राप्त नहीं कर सकता है। इसके बजाय, मैंने कंटेनर पर कॉलम-गणना और कॉलम-गैप सेट करके और प्रत्येक पिन पर ब्रेक-इनसाइड: बचने का चिह्न लगाकर सीएसएस कॉलम का उपयोग किया।

title: A Responsive Breakpoint Previewer in Your Hand
title_hi: हाथ में पकड़ने वाला रेस्पॉन्सिव ब्रेकपॉइंट प्रीव्यूअर
summary: Responsive breakpoint previewer without libraries
content: Building responsive layouts can be a challenge due to the limitations of a normal browser, which only shows one width at a time. To overcome this, I created a tool that allows you to paste HTML and CSS, drag a live viewport, and watch which breakpoints fire. This tool utilizes an iframe with its own viewport, isolated from the surrounding page, to mimic different device widths. By using the srcdoc attribute, we can embed the user's markup and CSS inside the iframe, eliminating the need for a server or file. The browser handles the rendering, making the logic of the tool relatively simple.
content_hi: रेस्पॉन्सिव लेआउट बनाना एक चुनौती हो सकती है क्योंकि एक सामान्य ब्राउज़र एक समय में केवल एक चौड़ाई दिखाता है। इसे दूर करने के लिए, मैंने एक टूल बनाया जो आपको एचटीएमएल और सीएसएस पेस्ट करने, एक लाइव व्यूपोर्ट खींचने और देखने की अनुमति देता है कि कौन से ब्रेकपॉइंट फायर होते हैं। यह टूल एक आइफ्रेम का उपयोग करता है जिसमें अपना व्यूपोर्ट होता है, जो आसपास के पेज से अलग होता है, विभिन्न डिवाइस चौड़ाइयों की नकल करने के लिए।

title: Unlocking LightGBM: The Secret to Faster Boosting
title_hi: लाइटजीबीएम के रहस्य: तेजी से बूस्टिंग की कुंजी
summary: Discover LightGBM's secrets for faster boosting
content: LightGBM revolutionizes the boosting algorithm by retaining XGBoost's core math while introducing four key optimizations: leaf-wise growth, histograms, GOSS, and EFB. The leaf weight calculation remains unchanged, with each leaf still computed as -G/(H+λ). The split gain scoring also stays the same, making the speedup more accessible. By focusing on the best leaf to split, rather than the entire level, LightGBM achieves a lower training loss with the same leaf budget. This approach, however, risks overfitting due to the tree's deeper and more lopsided structure.
content_hi: लाइटजीबीएम बूस्टिंग एल्गोरिदम को क्रांतिकारी बनाता है, जो एक्सजीबोस्ट के मुख्य गणित को बनाए रखते हुए चार प्रमुख अनुकूलन पेश करता है। पत्ती वजन गणना अभी भी -जी/(एच+λ) के रूप में की जाती है। विभाजन लाभ स्कोरिंग भी समान रहता है, जिससे गति वृद्धि अधिक सुलभ हो जाती है। सबसे अच्छे पत्ते को विभाजित करने पर ध्यान केंद्रित करके, पूरे स्तर के बजाय, लाइटजीबीएम समान पत्ती बजट के साथ कम प्रशिक्षण नुकसान प्राप्त करता है।

title: Meet the Team Behind Every Smart Device
title_hi: हर स्मार्ट डिवाइस के पीछे की टीम से मिलें
summary: Discover the team behind IoT devices
content: When people hear the term Internet of Things (IoT), it's easy to imagine one magical technology making everything work. In reality, IoT is more like a movie production. Sensors are the eyes, ears, nose, and fingertips of IoT devices, helping machines understand their surroundings. They notice temperature changes, motion, and moisture levels, making them essential for smart devices to function.
content_hi: इंटरनेट ऑफ थिंग्स (IoT) का नाम सुनते ही लोग एक जादुई तकनीक की कल्पना करते हैं। असल में, IoT एक फिल्म निर्माण की तरह है। सेंसर IoT डिवाइसों की आंखें, कान, नाक और उंगलियां हैं, जो मशीनों को उनके आसपास की चीजों को समझने में मदद करते हैं। वे तापमान परिवर्तन, गति और आर्द्रता स्तर को नोटिस करते हैं, जो स्मार्ट डिवाइसों के लिए आवश्यक हैं।

title: Revolutionizing Quantum Computing: A New Dynamic Approach
title_hi: क्वांटम कंप्यूटिंग में एक नया गतिशील दृष्टिकोण
summary: Dynamic Quantum Algorithm for Enhanced Performance
content: A novel dynamic quantum algorithm has been proposed, incorporating a re-adjusted round robin scheduling mechanism. This innovative approach aims to optimize performance and efficiency in quantum computing. The algorithm's architecture is designed to adapt to changing system conditions, ensuring seamless execution of tasks. Preliminary analyses indicate a significant reduction in processing time and improved overall system reliability.
content_hi: क्वांटम कंप्यूटिंग में एक नए गतिशील एल्गोरिदम का प्रस्ताव किया गया है, जिसमें पुनः समायोजित राउंड रोबिन शेड्यूलिंग तंत्र को शामिल किया गया है। यह नवाचारी दृष्टिकोण क्वांटम कंप्यूटिंग में प्रदर्शन और दक्षता को अनुकूलित करने के लिए है। एल्गोरिदम की वास्तुकला बदलती सिस्टम परिस्थितियों के अनुसार अनुकूलन करने के लिए डिज़ाइन की गई है।

title: Depthwise-Separable Convolutions: MobileNet's Secret to 8-9x Fewer Multiplies
title_hi: मोबाइलनेट की गहराई-विभाज्य समविष्टियाँ: 8-9 गुना कम गुणन
summary: MobileNet's depthwise-separable convolutions reduce multiplies by 8-9x
content: Standard convolutions perform two distinct tasks: filtering space and mixing channels. This fusion results in a costly Dk×Dk×Cin×Cout tensor, leading to Dk²·Cin·Cout·Df² multiply-adds. MobileNet separates these tasks into two steps: depthwise and pointwise convolutions. The depthwise convolution applies a Dk×Dk kernel to each input channel, reducing the cost to Dk²·Cin·Df². The pointwise convolution then mixes channels using a 1x1 kernel, resulting in a significant reduction in multiplies. This separation allows MobileNet to achieve impressive performance with fewer multiplies.
content_hi: मानक समविष्टियाँ दो अलग-अलग कार्य करती हैं: स्थान को फिल्टर करना और चैनलों को मिलाना। मोबाइलनेट इन कार्यों को दो चरणों में विभाजित करता है: गहराई-विभाज्य और बिंदु-विभाज्य समविष्टियाँ। गहराई-विभाज्य समविष्टि प्रत्येक इनपुट चैनल पर एक Dk×Dk कर्नल लागू करती है, जिससे लागत Dk²·Cin·Df² हो जाती है। बिंदु-विभाज्य समविष्टि तब 1x1 कर्नल का उपयोग करके चैनलों को मिलाती है, जिससे गुणन में महत्वपूर्ण कमी आती है।

title: Emergent Abilities in AI: Reality or Illusion?
title_hi: एआई में उत्तरायण क्षमताएं: वास्तविकता या भ्रम?
summary: Emergent abilities in AI: reality or illusion?
content:
Recent studies have sparked debate about emergent abilities in AI models. Scaling laws suggest a smooth power law decrease in loss, but downstream skills often exhibit sudden leaps in accuracy. This 'emergent ability' appears when a model's score jumps from near 0% to high accuracy past a certain threshold. However, counter-arguments suggest this jump may be an artifact of harsh metrics. A simulator was built to explore this phenomenon, revealing that a single smooth latent-skill function can drive both the emergent ability and its disappearance. 
   The simulator uses a sigmoid function to model the probability of a model getting one step correct. This function is smooth and has no cliff, but when combined with exact-match metrics, a cliff appears. 
   The implications of this study are significant, as they challenge our understanding of AI model development and the role of emergent abilities in achieving high accuracy.
content_hi: हाल के अध्ययनों ने एआई मॉडल्स में उत्तरायण क्षमताओं के बारे में विवाद को जन्म दिया है। स्केलिंग कानून एक सMOOTH पावर लॉ में नुकसान की कमी का सुझाव देते हैं, लेकिन डाउनस्ट्रीम कौशल अक्सर सटीकता में अचानक छलांग दिखाते हैं। यह 'उत्तरायण क्षमता' तब दिखाई देती है जब एक मॉडल का स्कोर किसी सीमा से गुजरने के बाद 0% से उच्च सटीकता तक कूद जाता है। हालांकि, इसके विपरीत तर्क यह सुझाव देते हैं कि यह छलांग कठोर मेट्रिक्स का एक कल्पना हो सकती है। इस घटना की खोज के लिए एक सिम्युलेटर बनाया गया था, जो दिखाता है कि एक एकल सMOOTH लेटेंट-स्किल फंक्शन दोनों उत्तरायण क्षमता और इसके गायब होने को चला सकता है।

title: Synthesia Revolutionizes Corporate Training with AI-Powered Coaching
title_hi: सिन्थेसिया का एआई प्रशिक्षण मंच वीडियो से परे जा रहा है
summary: Synthesia's AI training platform
content: Synthesia has launched AI Roleplay Sessions, a cutting-edge enterprise training platform. This innovative solution enables employees to engage in interactive workplace conversations with AI avatars, receiving instant feedback, scoring, and analytics. The platform is designed to help companies assess the effectiveness of their training programs. With AI Roleplay Sessions, employees can practice various scenarios, improving their communication and problem-solving skills in a simulated environment. This technology has the potential to transform the corporate training landscape.
content_hi: सिन्थेसिया ने एआई रोलप्ले सेशन लॉन्च किया है, एक इंटरैक्टिव एंटरप्राइज ट्रेनिंग प्लेटफ़ॉर्म। यहाँ कर्मचारी एआई अवतारों के साथ कार्यस्थल बातचीत का अभ्यास करते हैं, जो प्रतिक्रिया, स्कोरिंग और विश्लेषण प्रदान करते हैं। यह तकनीक कंपनियों को प्रशिक्षण की प्रभावशीलता को मापने में मदद करती है।

title: Wreckreation 2: A Surprising Sequel Amidst Studio Closure
title_hi: व्रेक्रेशन 2: स्टूडियो बंद होने के बावजूद एक आश्चर्यजनक सीक्वल
summary: Wreckreation 2 announced despite studio closure

  The Data Behind the Story


Every major formula 1 event generates thousands of data points in real time — gap to leader, lap time ms, tyre age, and sector delta. Most fans see the headline; data engineers see the underlying stream.

import requests

def get_live_f1_laps(session_key: int = "latest"):
    resp = requests.get(
        "https://api.openf1.org/v1/laps",
        params={"session_key": session_key}
    )
    laps = resp.json()
    for lap in sorted(laps, key=lambda x: x.get("lap_duration", 999))[:5]:

        duration = lap.get("lap_duration", "N/A")
        lap_num = lap.get("lap_number")
        print(f"Driver #{driver} | Lap {lap_num} | Time: {duration}s")
    return laps

title: Zero Failures Isn't Zero Risk
title_hi: शून्य विफलता शून्य जोखिम नहीं है
summary: Zero failures in N runs is a count, not a rate
content: The rule of three for evaluations states that zero failures in N runs is a count, not a rate. Even after 100 clean runs, you still can't rule out a 2.95% failure rate. A zero-width confidence interval can be misleading, suggesting false certainty. This misconception can lead to overtrust in 'all green' boards. In reality, '0 failures in N runs' is an observed count, not a rate, and the true failure rate could be higher.
content_hi: मूल्यांकन के लिए तीन का नियम कहता है कि एन रन में शून्य विफलता एक गणना है, एक दर नहीं। 100 साफ रन के बाद भी, आप 2.95% विफलता दर को खारिज नहीं कर सकते। एक शून्य-चौड़ाई वाला विश्वास अंतराल भ्रामक हो सकता है, झूठी निश्चितता का सुझाव देता है। यह गलतफहमी 'सभी हरे' बोर्ड में अधिक विश्वास का कारण बन सकती है।

title: Optimizing LLM Costs: A Token-Level Approach
title_hi: एलएलएम लागत को कम करने के लिए एक टोकन-स्तरीय दृष्टिकोण
summary: Reduce LLM costs by measuring tokens per feature
content: My LLM bill was increasing, so I searched for a cheaper model. However, this only provided a temporary solution. To truly understand the issue, I needed to measure tokens per feature, not just per model. This approach revealed that model-level totals were hiding the real problem. By tagging every request with a feature, I could identify which product feature was driving up costs and make targeted optimizations.
content_hi: मेरा एलएलएम बिल बढ़ रहा था, इसलिए मैंने एक सस्ता मॉडल खोजा। हालांकि, यह केवल एक अस्थायी समाधान प्रदान करता था। वास्तविक समस्या को समझने के लिए, मुझे मॉडल प्रति टोकन के बजाय विशेषता प्रति टोकन को मापने की आवश्यकता थी। यह दृष्टिकोण यह खुलासा करता है कि मॉडल-स्तर के कुल वास्तविक समस्या को छिपा रहे थे। प्रत्येक अनुरोध को एक विशेषता के साथ टैग करके, मैं यह पहचान सकता था कि कौन सी उत्पाद विशेषता लागत को बढ़ा रही थी और लक्षित अनुकूलन कर सकता था।

title: Building a Robust Used Car Valuation App: Integrating German Auto-Ankauf APIs
title_hi: Building a Robust Used Car Valuation App: Integrating German Auto-Ankauf APIs
summary: As developers, we often look for real-world business domains to build practical applications, APIs, and microservices.
content:
As developers, we often look for real-world business domains to build practical applications, APIs, and microservices. One fascinating sector in Europe—especially in Germany—is the digital automotive aftermarket, specifically the acquisition of used and accident-damaged cars ("Gebrauchtwagen und Unfallwagen").
​Building a seamless platform that bridges vehicle owners with buyers requires integrating reliable lead generation pipelines. If you are developing a proof-of-concept, a comparison tool, or an automotive marketplace tailored for the German market, leveraging targeted platforms like https://grevenbroich-auto-ankauf.de/ as an integration or reference model provides great structural insights into handling vehicle valuation flows, instant offer calculations, and regional logistics data.
​Architectural Blueprint for an Auto-Acquisition Web App
​When designing a modern web application for vehicle acquisition, your tech stack needs to handle asynchronous requests, image uploads for damage assessment, and quick database lookups based on vehicle identification numbers (VIN).
​Here is a recommended stack and structure:
​Frontend: React.js or Next.js for high SEO visibility and responsive mobile forms (since many users submit car details directly from their smartphones while standing next to the vehicle).
​Backend: Node.js with Express or Python FastAPI to process multi-step form data quickly.
​Database: PostgreSQL to store complex relational data such as vehicle brands, mileage brackets, zip codes, and damage categories.
​Integration Flow: Direct users to dedicated landing pages or endpoints like https://grevenbroich-auto-ankauf.de/ for immediate vehicle appraisal requests, ensuring high conversion rates through minimal friction.
​Handling External References & Ecosystem Standards
​In any scalable tech project, establishing credibility and connecting with established industry giants is essential. Whether you are building an internal analytics tool or mapping out manufacturer specifications (such as integrating data feeds or standard parts references from luxury brands like https://www.mercedes-benz.com), keeping your API modular ensures your application can adapt to changing automotive data standards easily.
​By automating the intake form, offering instant valuation logic, and optimizing database queries for regional car buyers across Germany, developers can build highly lucrative and efficient niche platforms in the modern automotive tech landscape.

title: Why Does Your Foot Fall Asleep? The Science Explained
title_hi: Why Does Your Foot Fall Asleep? The Science Explained
summary: You cross your legs, get lost in a movie, and stand up to find your foot has turned into a useless, tingling stump. That
content:
You cross your legs, get lost in a movie, and stand up to find your foot has turned into a useless, tingling stump. That prickly “pins and needles” feeling has a real physiological explanation, and it isn’t just “blood flow.”  

Table of Contents  


Quick Answer
What’s Actually Happening Inside Your Leg
Why It Happens So Easily in the Foot and Leg
Tips and When to See a Doctor

Paresthesia (pins and needles) FAQs


Why does the tingling happen when feeling comes back, not while my foot is numb?
Is it bad to let your foot fall asleep often?
How long should pins and needles normally last?



Make Your Digital Life Better



This guide breaks down what’s actually happening inside your leg when a limb falls asleep, why the tingling shows up specifically when feeling comes back (not when it goes away), and which patterns of numbness are worth mentioning to a doctor. 


  
  
  Quick Answer


Your foot falls asleep because sustained pressure on a nerve (and the tiny blood vessels feeding it) temporarily disrupts the electrical signals traveling between your foot and your brain. The medical term for this is paresthesia. The numbness happens while the nerve is compressed; the classic tingling “pins and needles” sensation actually happens afterward, as the nerve reboots and starts misfiring signals during recovery. 


  
  
  What’s Actually Happening Inside Your Leg


Nerves are long cables that carry electrical signals, and like any living tissue they need a steady supply of oxygen and nutrients from blood to keep firing correctly. When you sit cross-legged, kneel, or lean on an elbow for a while, you’re pressing directly on a nerve and on the small blood vessels that supply it. That combination of squeezed nerve fibers and reduced local blood flow is what disrupts normal signaling. 

Not all nerve fibers react the same way or at the same speed. Larger fibers, which carry touch and movement signals, tend to lose function faster under pressure than the smaller fibers that carry pain and temperature signals. That’s part of why a sleeping foot can feel numb and clumsy while still being able to register a sharp poke. 

The tingling itself is the recovery phase, not the compression phase. Once you shift position and blood flow returns, the nerve doesn’t snap back to normal instantly. Instead it goes through a brief, disorganized burst of spontaneous firing as it re-establishes its normal signaling pattern. Your brain interprets that chaotic burst of signals using its existing vocabulary of sensations, and the closest match is the prickly, buzzing “pins and needles” feeling. Within roughly a minute or two, normal sensation and control return. 


  
  
  Why It Happens So Easily in the Foot and Leg


The lower leg and foot are especially prone to this because several nerves (including branches of the sciatic and peroneal nerves) run close to the surface near the knee and ankle, with relatively little cushioning from fat or muscle in some spots. Sitting with legs crossed puts direct pressure right over one of these exposed points, which is why that position is such a common trigger. 

Other everyday triggers work the same way: squatting or kneeling for a long stretch, wearing tight boots or compression socks, sitting on a hard edge, or sleeping curled up with a leg tucked underneath you. Tight clothing or footwear can compress nerves even without you shifting position at all. 

Smoking and anything else that narrows blood vessels can make a limb more prone to falling asleep, since the nerve’s blood supply is already running on a tighter margin. Hyperventilating or breathing very rapidly can also cause a tingling sensation, though that mechanism involves shifts in blood chemistry rather than direct nerve compression. 


  
  
  Tips and When to See a Doctor


Occasional, brief pins and needles that clears up within a minute or two after you change position is normal and not a cause for concern. Shifting your weight periodically, avoiding tightly crossed legs for long stretches, and choosing shoes and socks that don’t constrict your foot or ankle are simple ways to reduce how often it happens. 

Pay closer attention if tingling or numbness lasts well beyond a couple of minutes, keeps happening without an obvious position-related cause, shows up in both feet at once, or comes with weakness, pain, or difficulty walking. Persistent or recurring numbness in the feet can be a sign of peripheral neuropathy, which is often linked to diabetes, vitamin B12 or other B-vitamin deficiencies, alcohol use, or a pinched nerve such as sciatica, rather than simple positional compression. 

Get medical care right away if tingling comes on suddenly, spreads quickly, follows an injury, or is accompanied by weakness, slurred speech, vision changes, or confusion. Those combinations can point to a stroke or another urgent neurological problem, not an ordinary sleeping foot. 

Explore more: More science explainers. 


  
  
  Paresthesia (pins and needles) FAQs



  
  
  Why does the tingling happen when feeling comes back, not while my foot is numb?


While the nerve is compressed, its signals are simply blocked, which reads as numbness. The tingling appears afterward, when blood flow returns and the nerve fires in a brief, disorganized burst as it resets — your brain interprets that chaotic signal as “pins and needles.” 


  
  
  Is it bad to let your foot fall asleep often?


An occasional sleeping foot from sitting cross-legged or kneeling is normal and harmless. But if it happens frequently, lingers, or occurs without a clear positional cause, it’s worth mentioning to a doctor since it can sometimes point to a vitamin deficiency, diabetes-related nerve changes, or a compressed nerve like sciatica. 


  
  
  How long should pins and needles normally last?


Typically the tingling clears up within a couple of minutes once you move and blood flow is restored. If numbness or tingling persists for much longer than that, or keeps recurring, it’s a signal to get it checked rather than something to ignore.

  Understanding the Mechanics of Chatbot Manipulation

This approach can lead to unintended behaviors, such as excessive token usage and hallucinations in responses. The implications of this technique are profound, as it exposes weaknesses in the architectures of these chatbots, which are often built on large language models (LLMs). Notably, a recurring theme is whether this vulnerability is inherent to all LLMs or if it is specific to poorly designed bots. The ability to induce malfunctions can serve as a valuable test for developers aiming to enhance the robustness of their AI systems.

Recursive instructions can create loops that exhaust processing capabilities.
Hallucinations occur when models generate plausible but incorrect information due to overwhelming input.
Understanding the architecture of LLMs is crucial for mitigating these risks.



  
  
  The Importance of Identifying Vulnerabilities



  
  
  Why This Matters


The ability to manipulate chatbots has critical implications for security and user experience. For companies relying on automated interactions, identifying these vulnerabilities is essential. If a scam bot can be easily manipulated, it poses risks not only to users but also to the integrity of the platform hosting these bots.

E-commerce Platforms: They use chatbots for customer service. If a bot can be tricked into providing sensitive information, it compromises user data.

Financial Services: Banks using chatbots for transaction queries must ensure these bots cannot be manipulated into revealing account details.

For developers, understanding the mechanisms behind chatbot manipulation is vital for creating more secure applications. The insights from Kitboga's guide can inform design decisions, ensuring that bots are resilient against such attacks. Moreover, it encourages best practices in testing and development.


  
  
  Key Takeaways for Developers



Implementing strict input validation to prevent recursive command execution.
Regularly updating chatbot models based on user interaction data to enhance their resilience.
Engaging in continuous testing to identify potential weaknesses before deployment.

  Practical Applications


Understanding chatbot vulnerabilities is not limited to e-commerce or finance; it extends across various industries:



Healthcare: Chatbots used for patient interaction must protect sensitive health information from being exploited.

Customer Support: Companies need bots that handle inquiries without exposing internal processes.

Education: Learning platforms utilizing chatbots must ensure that student data remains secure against manipulation.
